messages.content:
List A of medicine includes:

Select one:

a.
parenteral medicines


b.
external medicines


c.
poisons and narcotic's medicines


d.
enteral medicines
a. parenteral medicines

External medicines  we must keep :

Select one:

a.
in special boxes


b.
in dressing room


c.
separately from other medicines


d.
with all medicines
c. separately from other medicines

The general condition of the patient can be rated as:

Select one or more:

a.
minimally critical


b.
very critical


c.
good or bad


d.
positive condition
c. good or bad

The main characteristics of the skin are:

Select one or more:

a.
redness


b.
elasticity


c.
dry or wet


d.
color

b. elasticity 
c. dry or wet 
d. color

Dyspnea may be:

Select one or more:

a.
inspiratory


b.
expiratory


c.
in the morning


d.
mixed

a. inspiratory 
b. expiratory 
d. mixed

Rate of breathing must be:

Select one:

a.
about 14 to 20 times per minute


b.
more than 20 times per minute


c.
more than 25 times per minute


d.
about 20 to 25 times per minute
d. about 20 to 25 times per minute

The main sputum test are:

Select one or more:

a.
sputum test for acid – fact bacillus and for malignant cells


b.
sputum test for culture and sensitivity 


c.
sputum test for red cells


d.
sputum test for white cells

a. sputum test for acid – fact bacillus and for malignant cells 
b. sputum test for culture and sensitivity

We use spittoon:

Select one or more:

a.
spittoon with disinfection solution


b.
spittoon with alcohol


c.
spittoon with aqua distillata


d.
sterility  spittoon

a. spittoon with disinfection solution
d. sterile spittoon

The main  complains  in the first stage of fever  (stadium increment) are:

Select one:

a.
Collapse


b.
dyspnea and cough


c.
a chill, headache and subjective indisposition


d.
chest pain
c. a chill, headache and subjective indisposition

Tachycardia  and tachypnea  are in what stage of fever?

Select one:

a.
2


b.
Never


c.
1


d.
3

When temperature  rise at 1 degree

Select one:

a.
pulse rate and  respiration rate  are in normal


b.
respiration rate  -  on 4  at 1 minute


c.
pulse rate  rise on 8 – 10 at 1 minute


d.
blood pressure become high
c. pulse rate rise on 8 – 10 at 1 minute

The temperature may decrease gradually during several days –

Select one:

a.
it is called crisis


b.
it is called collaps


c.
it is called  normal


d.
it is called lysis
d. it is called lysis
